Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 152 

SR_CORE_UTILITIES_1_CD 

LABEL: Core HRSN Utility 1: Utility Company Threatened to Shut Off Services to Home 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) utilities identifies whether electric, gas, 
oil, or water company threatened to shut off services to home. 

LONG NAME: SR_CORE_UTILITIES_1_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system
